lines.hearsay: Somebody at {place} stood watching a notice get written, very closely.
lines.gossip: {A} stood over {B} at {place} until the roof slate was written out to {A}'s satisfaction — 'reasonable terms', which at the Rents has never once meant reasonable.
lines.report: {A} lodged a notice for roof slate with {B} at {place}, slot {slot}.
